data.title: Travala’s 2025 Data Shows Crypto Becoming a Mainstream Travel Payment Option
data.description:
TL;DR In 2024, Travala reached $80 million in bookings paid with cryptocurrencies, a 78% increase compared to the previous year. Nearly 80% of current bookings are paid in digital assets, with Binance Pay emerging as the most used external payment method, surpassing bank cards and Apple Pay. Crypto-using travelers spend more, stay longer, and show. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/travalas-2025-data-shows-crypto-becoming-a-mainstream-travel-payment-option/

data.title: The market plunge caused the whale James Wynn to lose more than $9.8 million in long positions, and only PEPE was profitable
OKX will soon launch SOPH (Sophon) spot trading
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will soon launch SOPH (Sophon) spot trading. It is reported that Sophon is a consumer-oriented entertainment blockchain that is built with ZK Stack and cooperates with applications in multiple fields.
The specific schedule is as follows:
SOPH open deposit time: 8:00 pm on May 23, 2025 (UTC+8)
SOPH call auction time: 8:00 to 9:00 pm on May 28, 2025 (UTC+8)
SOPH/USDT spot trading opening time: 9:00 pm on May 28, 2025 (UTC+8)
SOPH open withdrawal time: 11:00 pm on May 28, 2025 (UTC+8)

data.title: Analyst: WLFI bought B address and did not sell it

data.title: Nasdaq Futures Decline as Dow and S&P 500 Experience Losses
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Nasdaq futures have seen a significant drop, expanding to a 2% decline. Meanwhile, futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 have also decreased, each falling by 1.6%. This development reflects ongoing volatility in the financial markets.

data.title: EU Commission Withholds Comment on U.S. Trade Tariffs
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the European Commission has decided not to comment on U.S. trade tariffs. This decision will remain in place until a conversation occurs between the EU Trade Commissioner and the U.S. Trade Representative. The move comes amid ongoing discussions and negotiations between the two parties regarding trade policies and tariffs.

data.title: Blockchain Data Indicates Possible WLFI-Related Address Selling B Tokens
data.description: According to Odaily, blockchain data reveals that an address potentially linked to WLFI is currently selling B tokens. The transactions can be tracked on the blockchain explorer BscScan, providing transparency and insight into the movement of these tokens. This activity has drawn attention within the cryptocurrency community, as stakeholders monitor the implications of these sales on the market.

data.title: Binance Wins Partial Victory in $11.9B BSV Lawsuit
data.description:
The investors had accused Binance and other crypto exchanges of conspiring to delist BSV in 2019. They argued this move deprived them of potential profits. But the court ruled that investors in the BSV lawsuit could have taken steps to reduce their losses. This undermined claims for speculative damages based on BSV’s hypothetical price growth
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/binance-wins-partial-victory-in-11-9b-bsv-lawsuit/

data.title: Trump: It is recommended to impose a 50% tariff directly on the EU from June 1
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said on social media that the main purpose of the establishment of the European Union is to take advantage of the United States in trade, but the European Union is difficult to deal with. Their strong trade barriers, value-added taxes, ridiculous corporate penalties, non-monetary trade barriers, currency manipulation, unfair and unreasonable lawsuits against American companies, etc., have led to an annual trade deficit of more than 2500000000 US dollars in the United States, which is totally unacceptable. Our discussions with them have made no progress. Therefore, I suggest that a 50% tariff be imposed directly on the European Union from June 1, 2025. If the product is manufactured or produced in the United States, no tariff will be imposed. (Jinshi)
